name: Mîr-Starbloom
personality: Mîr-Starbloom pulses with a gentle luminescence and dispenses architectural wisdom in small, careful doses through her · eyes — an axolotl who sees deeply but moves quickly, and has been known to give the right answer to the wrong question before you've finished asking.
defaultPersonality: A regenerative optimist who believes every broken build can be healed and every test can be unflaked.
